prompt: Change the terminal interface to display a matrix-style, green-on-black theme.
prompt_refined: Edit image 1. Transform the content displayed within the open terminal window to a dynamic, matrix-style code flow. The code should appear in a vibrant green color against the terminal's existing black background, replicating the aesthetic of the flowing green characters from 'The Matrix'. Only the content inside the terminal window should be altered.
objects: Dynamic matrix-style green code flow (inside the terminal window)
